name: CAM — Control Anything on MacOS
description: Control macOS UI elements via the Accessibility API. Query AX trees (like a DOM tree), click, scroll, type text, press shortcuts, take screenshots, and switch apps — no vision model required.

screenshotOnQuery.label: Screenshot on Query
screenshotOnQuery.help: Capture a screenshot when querying UI elements

maxElements.label: Max Elements
maxElements.help: Maximum number of UI elements to return per query (default: 200)
